articles.title: European Leaders Meet to Address Security and Energy Concerns
articles.story: European Union leaders gathered in Brussels to discuss regional security and rising energy costs. Officials say stronger cooperation is needed to protect economic stability across the continent.

articles.title: Global Markets Mixed as Investors Watch Oil Prices
articles.story: Stock markets in Asia and Europe traded cautiously as investors monitored oil price movements and geopolitical tensions affecting global trade routes.

articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Investment Expands Worldwide
articles.story: Technology companies are investing billions into artificial intelligence development including advanced chips, data centers and research labs.

articles.title: Governments Debate Global AI Regulations
articles.story: Lawmakers across several countries are debating new regulations aimed at controlling artificial intelligence development and protecting user data.

articles.title: Athletes Prepare for International Indoor Championship
articles.story: Top athletes from more than 100 nations are preparing for a major indoor athletics championship expected to attract global attention later this month.

articles.title: Streaming Platforms Expand Global Entertainment Reach
articles.story: Major entertainment companies are expanding streaming services worldwide as audiences shift away from traditional television.
